title: zeltnera quitensis
intro: Zeltnera quitensis, also known as Quitense Zeltnera or Quitense Monkey Flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. It is native to Ecuador and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and as an anti-inflammatory agent. The plant is known to have health benefits such as reducing fever, soothing sore throats, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory infections, due to its high content of alkaloids, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping its leaves in hot water, which can be used to make various herbal preparations, including tinctures and salves.
